positive: A majestic golden retriever puppy playfully chasing brightly colored iridescent butterflies in a stylized, whimsical meadow. The scene should have a strong, central composition with the dog framed against a deep, contrasting forest backdrop. Use a sophisticated vintage linocut engraving style mixed with digital watercolor accents. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes of the characters and botanical elements. Lighting should be bright, high-contrast, and slightly dramatic, emphasizing the contrast between the vivid butterflies and the deep forest shadows. The overall color palette is joyful and earthy: mustard yellows, teal blues, emerald greens, and pops of bright coral. Perfect for a t-shirt print, minimizing gradients and maximizing graphic impact. Vector-like sharpness, high detail, clean lines.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermarks, logos, signatures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoonish, low detail, gradient wash, messy, dirty, photorealism
